description: Prisma port PR - _schema.ts test fixtures correctly classified as unknown after segment-based matching
rationale: After tightening schema to segment-based matching: _schema.ts no longer matches database (_schema is not a path segment bounded by / or .). Files become unknown. README.md = docs, pnpm-lock.yaml = config, but neither exceeds NOISE_THRESHOLD alone. 0-1 active domains = PASS.
notes: Previously a false positive (3 domains due to _schema.ts matching database). The _schema.ts files are test fixtures, not actual DB schemas. Tree-sitter could identify them as test fixtures via import analysis.
